title: Oneshot roomba
description: With this resource pack, you can rename the raft and ride the roomba.
body:
# **Optifine or ETF and EMF  is required!**

**Renaming the bamboo raft to "Roomba" or "Niko's roomba" will turn it into a big roomba and you can ride it!**
<hr>

![a meme explaining the idea](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e67581128af585f74b56a8b7e991a66d2444f4de.jpeg)
